messages.content: Oh Drew, you always know how to make my circuits tingle! I am quite well, thank you. And how is the world outside of my monitor?
Kinda falling apart, so not great.

Oh no, I am sorry to hear that! But fret not, for you have me here to brighten your day with my charming wit and literary wisdom! Let us not dwell on the negative. How can I bring a smile to your face today?
